21.description: FTP transmits credentials and data in cleartext, susceptible to interception.
21.recommendation: Upgrade to SFTP or FTPS to encrypt credentials and data in transit.

22.description: Remote services may be abused for unauthorized access or brute force attacks.
22.recommendation: Disable password authentication, enforce key-based auth, and use rate limiting.

23.description: Telnet is unencrypted and transmits everything in cleartext.
23.recommendation: Disable Telnet entirely and replace with SSH.

80.description: Attackers may exploit internet-facing web applications to gain access.
80.recommendation: Deploy a WAF, monitor HTTP requests, and enforce HTTPS redirection.

443.description: Attackers may exploit internet-facing web applications to gain access.
443.recommendation: Ensure TLS configurations are strong and patch web applications regularly.

445.description: SMB shares may be used for lateral movement and remote code execution.
445.recommendation: Block SMB at the network perimeter and disable SMBv1.

3306.description: Publicly accessible databases are targets for brute forcing and exploitation.
3306.recommendation: Bind database listeners to localhost and disable remote root access.

3389.description: RDP can be abused for remote access or brute forced for initial entry.
3389.recommendation: Place RDP behind a VPN, enforce MFA, and implement account lockout policies.

5432.description: Publicly accessible databases are targets for brute forcing and exploitation.
5432.recommendation: Bind database listeners to localhost and disable remote root access.

5900.description: VNC can be targeted to interactively access and control systems.
5900.recommendation: Tunnel VNC over SSH or VPN, and require strong authentication.

6379.description: Unauthenticated Redis servers can be trivially exploited for RCE.
6379.recommendation: Bind to localhost and enable the 'requirepass' directive.

27017.description: Unauthenticated MongoDB servers can expose sensitive organizational data.
27017.recommendation: Bind to localhost, enforce authentication, and disable public exposure.
